title: Flow If/Else (LLM)
description: Two-branch conditional router whose decision is made by a wired LLM.
The condition is a natural-language yes/no question (e.g. 'Is there a
dog in this image?'). The chunk and the question are sent to the LLM
via the control-plane invoke channel; the LLM is instructed to reply
with one word YES or NO. YES → THEN, anything else → ELSE. For image
lanes connect a vision-capable LLM. Audio and video need preprocessing
(STT, frame grabber) upstream — LLM APIs do not accept raw media buffers.

llm.description: LLM that evaluates the natural-language condition. Connect any llm_* node; for image lanes connect a vision-capable LLM (llm_vision_mistral, llm_vision_ollama, or any future vision-capable provider).

default.title: Default
default.flow_llm.condition: Does the content match the criterion?

flow_llm.condition.title: Question
flow_llm.condition.description: Natural-language yes/no question evaluated by the connected LLM. The chunk being routed is provided as context. Examples: 'Is this image a screenshot?', 'Is this text in Spanish?', 'Does the image contain a person?'. Be specific — the LLM is instructed to answer with a single word YES or NO.
flow_llm.condition.default: Does the content match the criterion?

flow_llm.timeout_s.title: Timeout (seconds)
flow_llm.timeout_s.description: Maximum wall-clock time per evaluation. LLM inference is much slower than sandbox eval; default 30s. Timeout routes to ELSE.

flow_llm.branches.title: Branch targets
flow_llm.branches.description: Maps each branch name to the list of downstream node IDs on that branch. Populated automatically by the canvas when you wire edges from the THEN / ELSE output ports.
